message:
fix(channel,remote): fix MPSC generation and lease overflow safety

- channel/mpsc.c: Increment generation counter on channel creation,
  consistent with oneshot, barrier, and other arena-based primitives.
  Without this, a reused channel slot would have the same generation
  as its predecessor, allowing stale handles to match.

- remote/remote.c: Make lease TTL expiry checks overflow-safe by
  computing elapsed time (now - granted) instead of (granted + ttl),
  which could overflow uint64_t in edge cases. Also guard against
  clock wrap (now < granted).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
